text:
EXPLANATION: The "Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement" is a real, official legal document published by Meta Platforms, Inc., available at llama.com and mirrored on Hugging Face and GitHub. The automated checker's "title mismatch" and "author mismatch" flags are artifacts of comparing the cited document title against the Hugging Face page title ("LICENSE.txt · meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B at main") and attributing authorship to Hugging Face, when the actual author/issuer is Meta Platforms, Inc. as stated throughout the license document itself.
LINK: https://www.llama.com/llama3_2/license/
FOUND_TITLE: Llama 3.2 Community License Agreement
FOUND_AUTHORS: Meta Platforms, Inc.
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
